scripts.check: node --check live/js/genesis-verification.js && node --check live/js/app.js && node --check live/api/deploy/funding.js && node --check live/api/deploy/[chain].js && node --check live/api/deploy/[chain]/revoke.js
scripts.build:live: cp -r live _live && echo 'Build complete: _live directory ready for deployment'
